summary: Tested 2 new features: 1) Quick Customer Picker in checkout dialog - VERIFIED WORKING. 2) Credit/Partial approval dialog PIN policy fixes - VERIFIED WORKING. Backend API verify-manager-pin endpoint tested successfully with PIN 521325. All frontend UI elements verified: customer search, dropdown, clear button, authorization dialog title, PIN input without maxLength, method badges (Admin PIN, Manager PIN, TOTP), correct placeholders and descriptions.

bugs_verified_as_fixed.verification: checkout-customer-picker container found, checkout-customer-search input found, dropdown shows matching customers, can select customer, clear (X) button visible
Title shows 'Authorization Required' instead of 'Manager Approval Required'
maxLength attribute removed from PIN input - can enter PINs longer than 6 characters (tested with 16 chars: '1234567890123456')
Description says 'Credit/Partial sales require PIN or TOTP authorization' and instruction text says 'Enter Admin PIN, Manager PIN, or TOTP code from Authenticator app'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features verified working. Quick Customer Picker appears in checkout dialog when no customer is selected - shows search input with placeholder 'Search customer or type Walk-in...'. Customer dropdown appears on typing, selecting customer shows info with X clear button. Credit approval dialog properly shows 'Authorization Required' title, has no maxLength on PIN input, shows Admin PIN/Manager PIN/TOTP badges, and has correct placeholder 'PIN or 6-digit TOTP code'. Backend verify-manager-pin endpoint at POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin works correctly with PIN 521325 and action_key 'credit_sale_approval'.
